Name: ToyOptionsComponent_GEN_VARIABLE
Flags: RF_Public | RF_Transactional | RF_ArchetypeObject | RF_WasLoaded | RF_LoadCompleted | RF_InheritableComponentTemplate

Internal_OptionsDescription.SourceString: This device allows props to be changed from default values. It will only affect a single, overlapped prop by default, but can be set to affect all object in a zone.
Internal_OptionsDescription.LocalizedString: This device allows props to be changed from default values. It will only affect a single, overlapped prop by default, but can be set to affect all object in a zone.
